decisions.rationale: The observation already resolves to its own base_record_id (project_34th-street-transitway-concept), which exists in the registry with matching source ID '20110118_34th_cac3_slides' and the alias 'project_34th-street-transitway-20110118'. The payloads match on project_name ('34th Street Transitway' vs '34th Street Transitway Concept'), project_type ('transitway'), and borough ('Manhattan'). No different existing record needs to be linked.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 34th Street Transitway. Key Facts: 33,000+ daily bus riders, 4.5 mph average bus speed, 90% of travelers on the corridor are walking or taking the bus.
